textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: A scattered pile of broken stone rubble and masonry fragments on a dungeon floor, irregular chunks of gray-blue limestone in various sizes from pebbles to fist-sized blocks, dust and grit around the edges, fallen from ancient walls or columns, dark fantasy dungeon game prop, isolated object, dark background

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Gray-blue limestone fragments, dust and stone grit, irregular broken surfaces, mineral staining from centuries of moisture
